title: The Mystery of the Pink Flamingo
original_title: The Mystery of the Pink Flamingo
overview: A square sound engineer employs unusual research efforts to reveal the secrets behind the quintessential icon of kitsch, the Pink Flamingo. His bizarre adventure will unexpectedly turn into a creative journey to self-discovery.
